phrases.intent_en: Ask where São Miguel Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a Capela de São Miguel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN mee-GEHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The chapel is famous for its azulejo tiles and gilded woodwork, integral to university ceremonies and history.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de áudio-guias da Biblioteca Joanina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH OW-deeoo-GEEUHSH DUH beeb-leeoo-TEH-kuh zhoouh-NEE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira na Porta Férrea ou pergunte a um guia oficial.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh NUH PAW-ruh-tuh FEH-reeuh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket booth at Porta Férrea or ask an official guide.

responses.english: Go to the ticket booth at Porta Férrea or ask an official guide.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh NUH PAW-ruh-tuh FEH-reeuh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL.
responses.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira na Porta Férrea ou pergunte a um guia oficial.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the botanical garden entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a entrada do Jardim Botânico?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah eh-zah-tah-MEN-chee ah-en-TRAH-dah doo-zhar-JEEN bo-TAH-nee-koo
phrases.cultural_note: The botanical garden is one of the oldest in Portugal, established in the 18th century within the university campus.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, acesso pela Rua do Colégio.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-soo PEH-luh ROOUH DOO koo-LEHZH-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, access via Rua do Colégio.

responses.english: Good day, access via Rua do Colégio.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-soo PEH-luh ROOUH DOO koo-LEHZH-yoo.
responses.local: Bom dia, acesso pela Rua do Colégio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where São Miguel Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de São Miguel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN mee-GEHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Capela de São Miguel is a richly decorated chapel within the Paço das Escolas, the main academic square of the University of Coimbra, and is one of the most visited landmarks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no Paço das Escolas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO PAH-soo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at Paço das Escolas.

responses.english: Good morning, at Paço das Escolas.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO PAH-soo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no Paço das Escolas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the university tower is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a Torre da Universidade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH TAW-rih DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: The university tower offers panoramic views and serves as a historic symbol of Coimbra's academic heritage.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no centro do Paço das Escolas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO PAH-soo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the center of Paço das Escolas.

responses.english: Good day, at the center of Paço das Escolas.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO PAH-soo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no centro do Paço das Escolas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy fado tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde comprar bilhetes para o fado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW FAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Coimbra fado is distinct from Lisbon's style, often performed by students in traditional academic attire.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guia oficial ou ao bilheteiro na zona da Alta de Coimbra.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo NUH ZOH-nuh DUH AHL-tuh DIH KOOEEMB-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask an official guide or the ticket seller in the Alta de Coimbra area.

responses.english: Ask an official guide or the ticket seller in the Alta de Coimbra area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo NUH ZOH-nuh DUH AHL-tuh DIH KOOEEMB-ruh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um guia oficial ou ao bilheteiro na zona da Alta de Coimbra.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à bilheteira da universidade a partir daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih AH puh-ruh-TEER duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Porta Férrea. A bilheteira encontra-se lá.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh FEH-reeuh. AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH LAH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Iron Gate. The ticket booth is there.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Iron Gate. The ticket booth is there.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh FEH-reeuh. AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH LAH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Porta Férrea. A bilheteira encontra-se lá.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the botanical garden entrance is
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica a entrada do jardim botânico?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN boo-TAHN-nee-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The garden features diverse plant species and provides a peaceful academic retreat within the city center.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Botânico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN boo-TAHN-nee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Botanical Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Botanical Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN boo-TAHN-nee-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Botânico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the university tower is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica a Torre da Universidade?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: The university tower is a prominent landmark in the Paço das Escolas square.

likely_response.local: No Paço das Escolas, ao centro.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO PAH-soo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh, OW SAYNGT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the Paço das Escolas, in the center.

responses.english: In the Paço das Escolas, in the center.
responses.phonetic: NOO PAH-soo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh, OW SAYNGT-roo.
responses.local: No Paço das Escolas, ao centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Joanina Library audio guide desk is
phrases.text_local: Oi, onde fica o balcão do áudio-guia da Biblioteca Joanina?
phrases.pronunciation: OY, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO OW-deeoo-GEEUH DUH beeb-leeoo-TEH-kuh zhoouh-NEE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The audio guide desk is usually located just inside the library entrance.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the entrance, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the botanical garden entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Jardim Botânico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN boo-TAHN-nee-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardim Botânico is a historic botanical garden established in the 18th century, part of the University of Coimbra. Its main entrance is well-known and leads directly to the ticket kiosk.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Botânico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN boo-TAHN-nee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Botanical Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Botanical Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN boo-TAHN-nee-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Botânico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get Joanina audio guide
phrases.text_local: Onde consigo o audioguia da Biblioteca Joanina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koong-SEE-goo AW ow-deeoo-GEEUH DUH beeb-leeoo-TEH-kuh zhoouh-NEE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Joanina Library is a UNESCO heritage site renowned for its baroque architecture and rare manuscript collections.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office of the Joanina Library.

responses.english: At the ticket office of the Joanina Library.
